title: Aurora, 33765, Palm Pals Belle Strawberry Cow 5In, Soft Toy, White & Pink
features: Introducing the Palm Pals Belle Strawberry Cow Soft Toy, the latest addition to Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. This adorable cow is a pink and white-coloured plush. It's filled with beans and perfectly fits into your palm. It's great for small cuddling and makes a wonderful gift for any occasion!

The Belle Strawberry Cow is part of the Palm Pals Barn collection. The Palm Pals range includes collections such as Craving, Pets, Craving, Critters, Aquatic, Zoo and many more. These soft toys are all super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and feature inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials.

Suitable from birth, the Palm Pals Belle Strawberry Cow measures 13cm. Belle is a superstar with an endless amount of energy, it thrives on hanging out and making memories. When given the chance, this little strawberry cow will spend hours conjuring up plans, making memories, and being everyone's bell of the ball. This adventurous cow will surely win everyone's hearts!

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful plush and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
description: Product Description Let's meet our Palm Pals Belle Strawberry Cow Soft Toy, the latest addition to Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. This adorable plush is pink and white-coloured. It's filled with beans and perfectly fits into your palm. It is great for cuddling and makes a wonderful gift for any occasion! The Belle Strawberry Cow is part of the Palm Pals Barn collection. The Palm Pals range includes collections such as Whimsical, Pets, Craving, Critters, Aquatic, Zoo and many more. These soft toys are all super gorgeous and irresistibly cute. Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and feature inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials. The Palm Pals Belle Strawberry Cow is suitable from birth and measures 13cm. Belle is a superstar with endless energy; she thrives on hanging out and making memories. Given the chance, this little strawberry cow will spend hours conjuring up plans, making memories, and being everyone's belle of the ball. This adventurous cow is sure to win everyone's hearts! Safety Warning Suitable from Birth
